name: kyoryokutai-backend
description: Backend for 協力隊クリアベース (regional revitalization team portal)

scripts.start:prod: echo 'RUN MIGRATE' && npx prisma migrate deploy && echo 'MIGRATE DONE' && if [ "$RUN_SEED" = "true" ]; then echo '=== RUN SEED ===' && npm run seed && echo 'SEED DONE'; fi && node dist/index.js
scripts.start:prod:baseline: echo 'BASELINE MIGRATE' && npx prisma migrate resolve --applied 20260403000000_add_government_attendance && npx prisma migrate resolve --applied 20260403000001_gov_attendance_add_time_enddate && npx prisma migrate resolve --applied 20260404000000_announcement_confirm_target && npx prisma migrate deploy && echo 'MIGRATE DONE' && node dist/index.js
scripts.start:prod:recover-p3009: echo 'RUN MIGRATE (recover: resolve failed email migration, then deploy)' && npx prisma migrate resolve --rolled-back 20260329000000_update_member_emails && npx prisma migrate deploy && echo 'MIGRATE DONE' && if [ "$RUN_SEED" = "true" ]; then echo '=== RUN SEED ===' && npm run seed && echo 'SEED DONE'; fi && node dist/index.js
